text: Perfect location right on the beach. Room was clean, staff very friendly. The only downside was the noisy A/C unit which kept us awake.
author: Thomas B.

text: Excellent stay, staff is what makes this place. Everyone from housekeeping to the front desk was amazing. Great pool area, clean rooms, direct beach access.
author: BeachLover2024

text: Loved our stay! The staff was incredible, always smiling. Breakfast was tasty with fresh fruit. Beach access is unbeatable.
author: Emma V.

text: Great location right on the beach. Check-in was a bit slow, waited 20 minutes. Room was clean and the bed was comfortable. Breakfast was basic but decent.
author: Michael R.

text: Average hotel. The noise from the A/C was a real issue. Parking was tight. Pool was nice though, kids loved it. Breakfast was meh.
author: TravelingDad

text: Location is great but the room smelled musty. Parking lot was small and often full. Check-in process was slow.
author: Carlos M.

text: Amazing staff, super friendly and helpful. The front desk lady went out of her way to help us with restaurant recommendations. Room was spotless, great ocean view.
author: Sarah K.

text: Beautiful ocean views. Staff was very welcoming. Check-in took a while (maybe 25 minutes) but the rest of the stay was smooth. Breakfast was simple but okay.
author: WanderingJane

text: Good value for the price. Room was comfortable. Breakfast was average, not many hot options. Staff was helpful with local tips.
author: Lisa H.

text: Disappointed. The A/C was noisy all night, we barely slept. Check-in took forever. Breakfast was very limited.
author: David L.

text: Nice hotel, great pool area. Parking was a bit tight and expensive. Staff was friendly and accommodating. Would stay again.
author: Jennifer M.
